cloudfront.realtimelogconfig.kinesisstre: Contains information about the Amazon Kinesis data stream where you are sending real-time log data.

cloudfront.realtimelogconfig.kinesisstre.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of an AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) role that CloudFront can use to send real-time log data to your Kinesis data stream.  For more information the IAM role, see [Real-time log configuration IAM role](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonCloudFront/latest/DeveloperGuide/real-time-logs.html#understand-real-time-log-config-iam-role) in the *Amazon CloudFront Developer Guide*.
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Kinesis data stream where you are sending real-time log data.
